formulas.name: Derivative of a Polynomial
formulas.variables: an, an-1, ..., a1, a0 are coefficients of the polynomial
formulas.notes: Used to find the derivative of a polynomial function

formulas.name: Power Rule for Derivatives
formulas.variables: x is the variable and n is the exponent
formulas.notes: Used to find the derivative of a function with a single variable and exponent

formulas.name: Product Rule for Derivatives
formulas.variables: f(x) and g(x) are functions of x
formulas.notes: Used to find the derivative of a product of two functions

formulas.name: Quotient Rule for Derivatives
formulas.variables: f(x) and g(x) are functions of x
formulas.notes: Used to find the derivative of a quotient of two functions

formulas.name: Chain Rule for Derivatives
formulas.variables: f(x) and g(x) are functions of x
formulas.notes: Used to find the derivative of a composite function

formulas.name: Derivative of Exponential Function
formulas.notes: Used to find the derivative of an exponential function

formulas.name: Derivative of Logarithmic Function
formulas.notes: Used to find the derivative of a logarithmic function
